characters.name: LIISA
characters.description: Väike inimene, umbes 5-aastane tüdruk, helepunane kootud müts tutiga, seljas soe sinine talvejope, jalas tumesinised talvepüksid ja rohelised labakindad. Tal on sõbralik ja naeratav nägu, suured uudishimulikud silmad. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: PEETER
characters.description: Väike inimene, umbes 6-aastane poiss, sinine kootud müts tutiga, seljas soe punane talvejope, jalas tumepruunid talvepüksid ja kollased labakindad. Tal on rõõmsameelne ja energiline nägu, suur naeratus. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: HUBANE TUBA
locations.description: Cozy children's living room with light blue walls, a soft colorful rug on a light wooden floor. A large window on the back wall shows a pristine snowy winter scene with snow-covered trees and soft falling snowflakes. A small, child-sized wooden table with two small chairs is in the center. A wooden bookshelf filled with colorful children's books is on the right wall. Warm, soft lamp light creates a cozy atmosphere. Cartoon style.

locations.name: LUMINE PARK
locations.description: A vast, peaceful snowy park covered in pristine white snow, several inches deep. Gentle snow-covered evergreen trees dot the background, creating a serene winter forest edge. A clear, bright blue winter sky overhead. The ground is entirely covered in undisturbed fresh white snow. Bright, crisp winter daylight. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Liisa and Peeter, both dressed in their indoor clothes (Liisa in a pink long-sleeved shirt and blue pants, Peeter in a green long-sleeved shirt and grey pants), are standing in the cozy living room (loc1). They are looking thoughtfully out the large window on the back wall. The window clearly shows a snowy winter scene outside with snow-covered trees. They both have curious, slightly pensive expressions. The room has light blue walls, a colorful rug, and a small wooden table with chairs. Warm lamp light fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter, still in their indoor clothes in the cozy living room (loc1), are now pointing excitedly out the large window on the back wall. Their faces are lit up with joy and anticipation as they clearly see the pristine white snow falling gently outside and covering the trees. They are smiling broadly. The room has light blue walls, a colorful rug, and a small wooden table with chairs. Warm lamp light fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa (wearing her red hat, blue jope, blue pants, and green mittens) and Peeter (wearing his blue hat, red jope, brown pants, and yellow mittens) are bundled up and standing just outside the cozy living room door, ready to go outside. They are full of energy and smiling brightly, looking eager to step into the snowy park. The snowy park (loc2) is visible behind them, full of deep white snow. Cartoon style.

Liisa (red hat, blue jope, green mittens) and Peeter (blue hat, red jope, yellow mittens) are standing in the middle of the snowy park (loc2). The snow is deep, reaching their knees, and they look amazed and happy. They are looking around at the vast white expanse, smiling at each other. Snow-covered trees are in the background. Bright winter daylight. Cartoon style.

Liisa (red hat, blue jope, green mittens) is lying on her back in the deep, fresh snow in the snowy park (loc2), moving her arms and legs to create a snow angel. She is laughing joyfully. Peeter (blue hat, red jope, yellow mittens) is standing nearby, watching her with a happy, amused expression. Snow-covered trees are in the background. Bright winter daylight. Cartoon style.

Peeter (blue hat, red jope, yellow mittens) is now lying on his back in the deep snow in the snowy park (loc2), making his own snow angel right next to Liisa's. He is smiling widely. Liisa (red hat, blue jope, green mittens) is sitting up next to her finished snow angel, watching Peeter and clapping her green mittens. Snow-covered trees are in the background. Bright winter daylight. Cartoon style.

Liisa (red hat, blue jope, green mittens) and Peeter (blue hat, red jope, yellow mittens) are both standing up in the snowy park (loc2), admiring their two newly made snow angels side-by-side in the deep snow. They are holding hands and laughing together, their faces full of happiness after playing in the snow. Snow-covered trees are in the background. Bright winter daylight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are back inside the cozy living room (loc1). They are in the process of taking off their winter gear near the door. Liisa (red hat, blue jope, green mittens) is pulling off her green mittens, while Peeter (blue hat, red jope, yellow mittens) is starting to untie his blue hat. They both look slightly rosy-cheeked from the cold but happy. The room has light blue walls, a colorful rug, and a small wooden table with chairs. Warm lamp light fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa (now in her pink long-sleeved shirt and blue pants) and Peeter (now in his green long-sleeved shirt and grey pants) are sitting comfortably on small wooden chairs at the child-sized wooden table in the cozy living room (loc1). They are both holding small, steaming cups of tea with both hands, sipping contentedly. They look warm, relaxed, and happy. The snowy view is still visible through the window. The room has light blue walls, a colorful rug, and a bookshelf. Warm lamp light fills the room. Cartoon style.
